I found your dental appointment in the calendar:

- Event: "Dentist Appointment" (id: 5)  
- When: 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00  
- Location: Downtown Dental Clinic  
- Status: confirmed

Before I reschedule it I need a couple quick details from you:

1. New date & time — please give the new start time in this format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM. (If you want the same duration, you can leave the end time blank; I’ll keep it 1 hour.)  
   - Example: 2024-05-24 14:30 (I’ll make the end time 15:30 unless you tell me otherwise.)

2. Do you want me to notify the dental clinic (or any other participants) about the change? If yes, please provide the clinic’s email (or say “notify clinic” and I’ll include participants in the event—note: the current event only lists your email, so I’ll need the clinic contact to notify them).

3. If you don’t have a specific time, tell me your availability (e.g., “next week mornings” or “weekdays after 3pm”) and I can suggest a few slots and check your calendar for conflicts.

Tell me which option you prefer and I’ll reschedule it.
